- [Subscribe](./examples/php/)


 ```php
 <?php
namespace ccxt;
include_once (__DIR__.'/../../ccxt.php');
// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

// PLEASE DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE, IT IS GENERATED AND WILL BE OVERWRITTEN:
// https://github.com/ccxt/ccxt/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#how-to-contribute-code

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

error_reporting(E_ALL);
date_default_timezone_set('UTC');

use ccxt\Precise;
use React\Async;
use React\Promise;


// AUTO-TRANSPILE //
function print_message($message) {
    if ($message->error) {
        var_dump('Received error, should reconnect. Error: ', $message->error);
    }
    if ($message->payload !== null) {
        var_dump('Received message: ', ' from: ', $message->metadata->topic, ' : ', ((string) $message->payload), ' : index : ', $message->metadata->index);
    }
}


function example() {
    return Async\async(function () {
        $exchange = new \ccxt\pro\binance(array());
        $exchange->set_sandbox_mode(true);
        // exchange.verbose = true;
        // create ws subscriptions
        $symbol = 'BTC/USDT:USDT';
        // subscribe to errors and all incoming messages
        $exchange->subscribe_errors('print_message');
        $exchange->subscribe_raw('print_message');
        try {
            Async\await($exchange->subscribe_ohlcv($symbol, '1m', 'print_message'));
            Async\await($exchange->subscribe_order_book($symbol, 'print_message'));
            Async\await($exchange->subscribe_ticker($symbol, 'print_message'));
            Async\await($exchange->subscribe_tickers(null, 'print_message'));
            Async\await($exchange->subscribe_trades($symbol, 'print_message'));
        } catch(Exception $e) {
            var_dump('subscribe error:', $e);
        }
        // private subscriptions
        var_dump('---- start private subscriptions asynchrounously -----');
        // await exchange.subscribeBalance (printMessage);
        // await exchange.subscribeMyTrades (symbol, printMessage);
        // await exchange.subscribeOrders (symbol, printMessage);
        // await exchange.subscribePositionForSymbols (undefined, printMessage);
        Async\await($exchange->sleep(5000));
        var_dump('---- create Market order -----');
        // const res = await exchange.createOrder (symbol, 'market', 'buy', 0.01);
        // console.log (res);
        // await exchange.close ();
        // subscribe to error?
        var_dump('---- closing exchange -----');
        Async\await($exchange->close());
    }) ();
}


Async\await(example());
 
```
